patches_this_run.description: Added parenthetical noting coupling range spans coplanar and coaxial orientations, coaxial toward upper end.
Added 3,000 km aperture sensitivity case: area 2.83e7 km^2, ratio ~44:1, B_south ~1,400 nT — 46x discrepancy. Bounds self-contradiction regardless of aperture.

Added directional constraint sentence: north-source/south-sink topology requires opposite-directed fields at poles; B(r) positive C coefficient adds directional contradiction on top of magnitude failure.
Defined acknowledge-without-fix pattern on first use in SEC-4.1 (part4): added parenthetical '(acknowledging a critique in commentary while leaving the underlying architecture unchanged)'.

recommended_actions.action: Restore agent schedules to BAU intervals. Curmudgeon mode=bau but current_interval=30min (default=240min). All three agents (curmudgeon, analyst, decider) appear to be running at churn-and-burn intervals despite queue being non-empty but mode=bau (monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json:schedule_state). Operator should update scheduled task intervals: curmudgeon 240min, analyst 120min, decider 240min.

230 open issues reported in prior run; now 213 after M1 closures. Burndown continues. 12 pending-human total (3 prior + 9 from this sweep). Auto-revert fires at open < 50 for 3 consecutive runs OR after 2026-05-17 (monitor/decisions/decider-mode.json:auto_revert_after).
